title: Protocole for Mycobacterium ulcerans DNA detection in environmental samples using real time PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9669r","text":"This protocole provide guidance to detect Mycobacterium ulcerans in environmental samples. The protocole share the DNA extraction process using the FastDNA kit for soil samples and the amplification of gene based on a validated protocole published by Fyfe which is the most protocole use to date for such analyis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":41,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"1ts7k","text":"DNA extraction should be performed before the PCR analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5n58","text":"The extract process should be adapted to the samples type and strictely adhere to the manufacturer recommendations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"dkl6c","text":"All samples should be stored in refrigerator in +2ºC to +8ºC. The day of the analysis, samples must be left at the laboratory temperature (22ºC to 25ºC) before used. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"84o6q","text":"Before starting all the process, the biosafety rules and the good laboratoty practices should strictely observed.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f1svo","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ca1ob","text":"As the mycobacteria is skin infection, always wear laboratory coat and gloves.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Issaka Maman
